#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/tcastDemo

#- You may have to change tcastDemo to something else
#- everywhere it appears in this file

#< envPaths

## Register all support components
dbLoadDatabase("../../dbd/tcastDemo.dbd",0,0)
tcastDemo_registerRecordDeviceDriver(pdbbase)

# TCLK 239.128.1.4
# TEST 239.128.1.5
# NML  239.128.4.4
# CMTF 239.128.4.5
epicsEnvSet("PREF", "MD:")

epicsEnvSet("TCAST_DEFAULT", "group=239.128.1.5")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastHealth.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:07:,TCAST=0x07")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:0C:,TCAST=0x0C")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:0F:,TCAST=0x0f")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:19:,TCAST=0x19")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:A5:,TCAST=0xA5")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TEST:BE:,TCAST=0xBE")

dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastHealth.db","P=$(PREF)TCLK:,TCAST=group=239.128.1.4")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TCLK:0C:,TCAST=group=239.128.1.4 0x0C")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TCLK:0F:,TCAST=group=239.128.1.4 0x0F")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TCLK:11:,TCAST=group=239.128.1.4 0x11")
dbLoadRecords("../../db/tcastEvent.db","P=$(PREF)TCLK:18:,TCAST=group=239.128.1.4 0x18")

var tcastDebug 1

iocInit()
